sn4.12:1.1: On one occasion the Blessed One was dwelling at Sāvatthī in Jeta's Grove, Anāthapiṇḍika's Park. Now on that occasion the Blessed One was teaching the Dhamma while surrounded by a large assembly. sn.i.110
sn4.12:2.1: Then it occurred to Māra the Evil One: "This ascetic Gotama is teaching the Dhamma while surrounded by a large assembly. Let me approach the ascetic Gotama in order to confound them."[n.281] Vicakkhukammaya, lit. "for making eyeless." Spk: Out of a desire to destroy the wisdom-eye of the people in the assembly. He is unable to destroy the Buddha’s wisdom-eye, but he could do so for the people in the assembly by manifesting a frightening sight or noise.
sn4.12:2.2: Then Māra the Evil One approached the Blessed One and addressed him in verse:
sn4.12:5.1: Then Māra the Evil One … disappeared right there.
